summary: Iteration 52: Verified 3-state enrollment system (open/closed/coming_soon), is_group_program field, Notify Me API, and Admin Programs Hub with 3 sections. All backend tests (15/15) passed. Frontend UI correctly displays all 3 enrollment states with appropriate badges and actions.
seed_data_creation: Test notify-me subscribers created via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified: (1) enrollment_status field with 3 states: open/closed/coming_soon (2) is_group_program field for group program filtering (3) /api/notify-me endpoint for Coming Soon subscriptions (4) Admin Programs Hub with 3 sections: Upcoming/Flagship/Group (5) Flagship cards show tier selector, pricing, badges, Notify Me form for Coming Soon, and correct button states per enrollment status.

verified: Open: Shows pricing, tier selector, Know More, Cart, Enroll Now buttons
Closed: Shows only Know More button (no pricing, no badges, no enroll)
Coming Soon: Shows 'Coming Soon' badge, Notify Me form, Know More button (no pricing, no enroll)
3-tier selector (1M/3M/Annual) with gold highlight on selection
3 sections: Upcoming Programs, Flagship Programs, Group Programs
Status dropdown with 3 options: Open/Closed/Coming Soon
Closure text dropdown for closed status
Show and Upcoming toggles for flagship programs
Expandable tier rows with start/end date inputs
Flagship Programs section with tier pricing
Group Programs section (shows message when no group programs)
Personal Sessions section filters out unnamed/empty sessions
Programs section filters out is_upcoming programs
Programs section filters out is_group_program programs
All programs returned with both fields
